title: User A cannot read User B's tasks
description: Verifies Row Level Security is enforced on the tasks table — an authenticated user can only SELECT rows where user_id matches their own JWT sub.

steps.description: Authenticate as User A and obtain JWT_A
Authenticate as User B and obtain JWT_B; insert a task row owned by User B
Using JWT_A, issue GET /tasks?user_id=eq.{{USER_B_ID}} against Supabase REST API
Verify the response returns an empty array or a 0-row result (not User B's task)

title: User A cannot read User B's aura_logs
description: Verifies RLS on the aura_logs table prevents cross-user reads.

steps.description: Authenticate as User A (JWT_A) and User B (JWT_B); insert an aura_log row for User B
Using JWT_A, issue GET /aura_logs?user_id=eq.{{USER_B_ID}}
Verify the response returns an empty array

title: User A cannot write to User B's profile
description: Verifies PATCH /profiles for another user's row is rejected by RLS.

steps.description: Using JWT_A, issue PATCH /profiles?id=eq.{{USER_B_ID}} with body {total_aura_points: 99999}
Verify the response returns HTTP 403 or 0 rows affected

title: Unauthenticated request returns 401 on all protected tables
description: Verifies that requests without a valid JWT are rejected on tasks, aura_logs, profiles, and daily_scores.

steps.description: Issue GET /tasks without Authorization header
Verify HTTP 401 or empty result with policy denial
Issue GET /aura_logs without Authorization header
Verify HTTP 401 or empty result with policy denial

title: User can read and write only their own daily_scores
description: Verifies the daily_scores table enforces user-scoped RLS for both SELECT and INSERT.

steps.description: Using JWT_A, INSERT a daily_scores row for today's date
Verify the row is created with user_id matching User A
Using JWT_A, SELECT all daily_scores
Verify only rows where user_id = User A are returned

title: aura_logs.net computed column equals earned minus lost
description: Verifies the generated column net = earned - lost is stored accurately.

steps.description: Using JWT_A, UPSERT an aura_logs row with earned=800, lost=200, date=today
Verify the SELECT response shows net=600

title: Daily earned AP capped at 2000
description: Verifies the backend rejects or clamps earned values exceeding the 2000 daily cap.

steps.description: Using JWT_A, attempt to UPSERT an aura_logs row with earned=2500 for today
Verify the stored earned value is at most 2000

title: Daily lost AP capped at 2000
description: Verifies the backend rejects or clamps lost values exceeding the 2000 daily cap.

steps.description: Using JWT_A, attempt to UPSERT an aura_logs row with lost=3000 for today
Verify the stored lost value is at most 2000

title: Streak multiplier correctly scales net AP
description: Verifies the auraService applies the multiplier from profiles when computing final AP.

steps.description: Set profiles.multiplier = 2.0 for User A
Trigger AP calculation for User A with earned=500 and lost=0
Verify profiles.total_aura_points increases by 1000 (500 * 2.0)

title: Multiplier capped at 4.0x
description: Verifies the multiplier field in profiles cannot exceed 4.0.

steps.description: Attempt to PATCH profiles.multiplier = 5.0 for User A
Verify the stored multiplier is 4.0 (capped) or the request is rejected

title: All 5 dailies completed grants exactly 1000 AP
description: Verifies the scoring engine awards exactly 1000 AP when Workout + Nutrition + Sleep + Mood + Goals are all marked complete for the day.

steps.description: Mark Workout, Nutrition, Sleep, Mood (>= Stable), and Goals as complete for User A today
Call the daily scoring RPC or service endpoint for User A
Verify the aura_logs earned value for today is exactly 1000 (from dailies block)

title: Partial daily completion grants proportional AP
description: Verifies completing 3 out of 5 dailies awards 600 AP (3/5 * 1000).

steps.description: Mark only Workout, Nutrition, and Sleep as complete for User A today; leave Mood and Goals incomplete
Call the daily scoring RPC for User A
Verify the aura_logs earned value from dailies is 600

title: Goals/Hobbies block awards proportional AP by difficulty weight
description: Verifies the dynamic 1000 AP Goals/Hobbies block awards higher points to harder goals and fewer to easier ones.

steps.description: Create a hard goal (weight=high) and an easy hobby (weight=low) for User A
Mark both the hard goal and easy hobby as complete and trigger scoring
Verify the hard goal contributes more AP than the easy hobby within the 1000 AP block

title: profiles.total_aura_points updates after aura_logs upsert
description: Verifies the trigger or service that rolls up aura_logs into profiles.total_aura_points fires correctly.

steps.description: Record the current profiles.total_aura_points for User A
UPSERT an aura_logs row with earned=200, lost=0 for today
Verify profiles.total_aura_points has increased by 200

title: profiles.rank_tier recalculated after AP update
description: Verifies rank_tier is updated on the profiles row after total_aura_points changes.

steps.description: Set User A as the highest AP user in the test environment
Trigger AP recalculation via scoring RPC
Verify profiles.rank_tier reflects a named top rank (not 'Normie' or 'Unranked')

title: Top-3 AP user receives named rank tier
description: Verifies that a user ranked 1st, 2nd, or 3rd on the leaderboard receives a specific named rank rather than 'Unranked'.

steps.description: Seed the leaderboard with at least 5 users; give User A the highest total_aura_points
Fetch profiles ordered by total_aura_points DESC and check rank_tier for User A
Verify rank_tier is a named rank string (not 'Unranked #N')

title: User outside top 3 receives Unranked #N string
description: Verifies that a user ranked 4th or lower receives 'Unranked #<exact_position>' as their rank label.

steps.description: Ensure User A is ranked 5th on the leaderboard by total_aura_points
Call the rank resolution RPC or fetch profile rank label for User A
Verify the rank label is 'Unranked #5'

title: Rank positions accurately ordered by AP descending
description: Verifies the leaderboard query returns users in correct descending AP order.

steps.description: Query profiles ordered by total_aura_points DESC
Verify each row's total_aura_points is >= the next row's value

title: Rank updates when another user surpasses current user AP
description: Verifies that rank labels are recalculated dynamically when a different user's AP changes.

steps.description: User A is at rank #2; User B is at rank #3
Give User B more AP than User A via aura_logs upsert
Verify User A's rank label updates to #3 and User B's to #2

title: Volume formula sets x reps x weight persisted correctly
description: Verifies workout_logs stores volume correctly using the formula Sets × Reps × Weight.

steps.description: Insert a workout_log entry: exercise='Bench Press', sets=3, reps=10, weight=80
Verify the stored or computed volume is 2400 (3 × 10 × 80)

title: Muscle group volume aggregated correctly per session
description: Verifies the per-muscle-group volume aggregation used by the pentagram chart is accurate.

steps.description: Insert 3 chest exercises with volumes 1000, 500, 750 in the same session
Call the muscle group aggregation RPC for the session
Verify chest group total volume = 2250

title: Weekly hypertrophy progress resets at Sunday midnight UTC
description: Verifies the weekly progress counter resets to 0 when the cron job fires at Sunday 00:00 UTC.

steps.description: Set User A's weekly hypertrophy progress to 80%
Execute the weekly reset cron function directly via RPC (simulating Sunday midnight)
Verify the weekly progress value is now 0 for User A

title: VO2 Max score calculated from BPM + Distance + Time + Age
description: Verifies the VO2 Max RPC returns a score based on a 10-minute Airbike session inputs.

steps.description: Call the calculate_vo2max RPC with inputs: bpm=160, distance_km=3.5, time_min=10, age=25
Verify the response contains a numeric vo2max_score field
Verify the score is a reasonable VO2 Max value (between 20 and 80 ml/kg/min)

title: VO2 Max score is bounded 0 to 100
description: Verifies the normalized VO2 Max display score (out of 100) is clamped within range.

steps.description: Call calculate_vo2max with extreme inputs (e.g., bpm=220, distance_km=10, time_min=10, age=15)
Verify the normalized score is <= 100
Call calculate_vo2max with very low inputs (bpm=60, distance_km=0.5, time_min=10, age=70)
Verify the normalized score is >= 0

title: Sleep 8h + Deep Sleep 9/10 = 100% progress
description: Verifies the sleep scoring function returns 100% when both duration and deep sleep quality thresholds are met.

steps.description: Insert a sleep_log entry: duration_hours=8, deep_sleep_rating=9, date=today
Call the sleep progress scoring function for User A today
Verify the returned sleep progress is 100%

title: Partial sleep values return proportional progress
description: Verifies the sleep scoring is proportional: 6h sleep + 7/10 deep sleep does not return 100%.

steps.description: Insert a sleep_log entry: duration_hours=6, deep_sleep_rating=7, date=today
Call the sleep progress scoring function for User A today
Verify the returned sleep progress is less than 100% (proportional to 6/8 and 7/10)

title: Nutrition baseline macros and micros saved and retrievable from profiles.preferences
description: Verifies that a user's personal baseline nutrient thresholds can be saved to profiles.preferences and read back.

steps.description: PATCH profiles.preferences for User A with a baseline object containing all macro and micro targets
GET profiles for User A and extract preferences.nutrition_baseline
Verify the saved baseline matches the submitted values

title: All 16 tracked micronutrients present in nutrition log schema
description: Verifies the nutrition_logs table or JSONB structure contains fields for all 16 required micronutrients: VitaminD3, VitaminB12, VitaminC, VitaminE, VitaminK2, Calcium, Magnesium, Potassium, Sodium, Zinc, Iron, Iodine, Copper, Omega3, Fiber, Water.

steps.description: Insert a nutrition_log entry with all 16 micronutrient fields populated for User A today
Verify the SELECT response contains non-null values for all 16 micronutrient fields

title: Reaching baseline thresholds marks nutrition 100% complete
description: Verifies the nutrition scoring function returns 100% when all baseline targets are met or exceeded.

steps.description: Set User A's nutrition baseline thresholds in profiles.preferences
Insert a nutrition_log for today where all macro and micro values meet or exceed the baseline
Call the nutrition progress scoring function for User A today
Verify the returned nutrition progress is 100%

title: Study progress: 2h = 100%, 1h = 50%
description: Verifies the study scoring function correctly maps study duration to progress percentage.

steps.description: Insert a study_log entry with duration_hours=2.0 for User A today
Verify study progress is 100%
Insert a study_log entry with duration_hours=1.0 for User A today (overwrite)
Verify study progress is 50%

title: compute_midnight_penalties docks inactive users 1000 AP
description: Verifies the midnight penalty cron function identifies users who did not log activity and deducts 1000 AP.

steps.description: Ensure User A has no task completions logged for yesterday
Record User A's current total_aura_points
Execute compute_midnight_penalties() directly via Supabase RPC
Verify User A's total_aura_points has decreased by 1000
Verify an aura_logs entry with lost=1000 and reason containing 'penalty' exists for yesterday

title: Weekly progress bar resets via Sunday midnight cron
description: Verifies the weekly hypertrophy reset cron fires and zeroes weekly progress for all users.

steps.description: Set weekly_workout_progress to 75 for User A
Execute reset_weekly_progress() directly via Supabase RPC
Verify weekly_workout_progress for User A is now 0

title: Broken streak resets multiplier to 1.0x
description: Verifies that when a streak is broken (no activity logged for a day), the multiplier resets to 1.0.

steps.description: Set User A's profiles.multiplier = 2.5 and profiles.current_streak = 5
Execute compute_midnight_penalties() simulating a missed day for User A
Verify profiles.multiplier is reset to 1.0 for User A
Verify profiles.current_streak is reset to 0 for User A
